requirement_name: Small station square body isolator pads
exact_recreation_spec: Square flat pad 70 x 70 x 22 mm; flat parallel faces; light edge radius/chamfer; leave undrilled or centre-marked until crush-sleeve OD is known
material_spec: New black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; no tyre rubber, crumb rubber, mixed offcuts, used rubber, or salvage rubber
critical_measurements: Confirm station count, flat footprint, desired free height, sleeve OD, and final installed stack height; final rubber hole = sleeve OD + 0.5-1.0 mm
fit_and_test: Dry-fit with separate washers/cups and sleeves; body height must return without over-crushing rubber or forcing tub alignment
notes: Current tub/chassis evidence does not prove a shaped rubber socket; preferred custom shape is square.

vehicle_location: Main tub-to-chassis mount stack large pair
requirement_name: Large station square body isolator pads
exact_recreation_spec: Square flat pad 80 x 80 x 24 mm; flat parallel faces; light edge radius/chamfer; leave undrilled or centre-marked until crush-sleeve OD is known
material_spec: New black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; same batch/hardness as small pads where possible; no used or salvage rubber
critical_measurements: Confirm the large-pair station, flat footprint, desired free height, sleeve OD, and final installed stack height; final rubber hole = sleeve OD + 0.5-1.0 mm
fit_and_test: Dry-fit as a pair on the correct stations; no side-to-side height mismatch after tub alignment
notes: Large pair height remains 24 mm; final shape is square unless station photos release a specific trim.

exact_recreation_spec: Steel sleeve ID 10.8-11.0 mm for M10 bolt; OD must suit final rubber bore/cup register; length equals completed free rubber stack minus 3-4 mm target compression; order 8 blanks before final cut
material_spec: Steel tube, zinc plated or painted after cutting; square-cut and deburred
critical_measurements: Measure old sleeve OD and length with calipers; confirm bolt diameter/thread; confirm cup/rubber stack height by station
fit_and_test: Sleeve must prevent over-crush at final torque; M10 bolt must pass freely; no loose sleeve rattle after assembly
notes: Spec is ready for blank/tube order; BMA-006 dry-stack measurement controls final cut length.

exact_recreation_spec: Inspect existing cup/seat washers separately; recreate only if originals are cracked, thinned, distorted, or no longer support the rubber/sleeve stack. Dimensions remain measurement-controlled from the actual washers and landing faces.
material_spec: Steel cup/seat washers, plated or epoxy primed; not part of the Longman rubber order
critical_measurements: Confirm which original cups can be reused; confirm hole clearance, dish/seat depth, and compatibility with square pad plus crush sleeve
fit_and_test: Rubber and sleeve must seat without rocking; no thin generic washer substitution; dry-fit before final coating
notes: Washer/cup hardware controls the stack but does not prove the chassis pedestal needs a round rubber outer profile.

vehicle_location: Separate front support / nose-extension isolator positions
exact_recreation_spec: Overall length 96 mm; max width 64 mm; free thickness 15 mm; two 12 mm holes; hole centre spacing 64 mm; rectangular relief 36 x 18 mm with R3 corners; top metal insert/boss OD 29 mm
material_spec: New black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; reproduce or reuse steel insert if the original design uses one; no used or salvage rubber
critical_measurements: Confirm hole centre spacing, thickness, and insert OD directly from sample; confirm whether insert is bonded, loose, or part of washer stack
fit_and_test: Dry-fit front support with both pads as matched pair; front clip height must align without forcing tub or nose extension
notes: Spec is ready for quote/prototype; BMA-010 confirms final fastener diameter/pitch.

vehicle_location: Left separate front support / nose-extension strip or bonded liner
exact_recreation_spec: Candidate only; working quote envelope 165 x 40 mm; base 8 mm; raised/load pad 14 mm; final outline and holes must come from a physical carrier or installed-location trace
material_spec: New black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5 if confirmed required; rubber-to-metal bond adhesive only if carrier proves bonded
critical_measurements: Prove the piece exists on the left carrier/location; trace physical part/carrier; mark hole centres from carrier, not distorted rubber; confirm slot shape and handedness
fit_and_test: Do not cut or order from current mixed photos; dry-fit only after physical trace confirms the part
notes: Current loose-part images are mixed with bump-stop fragments; this is not a known released piece yet.

vehicle_location: Right separate front support / nose-extension strip or bonded liner
exact_recreation_spec: Candidate only; mirror CR-FRONT-002 only if the physical right-side carrier proves symmetric; same working section dimensions after confirmation
material_spec: New black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5 if confirmed required; same material batch as left strip
critical_measurements: Prove the piece exists on the right carrier/location; trace physical part/carrier; confirm left/right handedness; mark hole centres from carrier
fit_and_test: Do not cut or order from current mixed photos; make both sides only after physical trace confirms the parts
notes: The old right-strip dashboard image is now treated as bump-stop evidence first, not a strip master.

vehicle_location: Possible long or full-width flat body/panel liner strips
exact_recreation_spec: No orderable dimensions yet; possible continuous anti-squeak/body liner strips need location, quantity, length, width, thickness, holes/slots, side/orientation, and function confirmed before quoting
material_spec: EPDM or NR/SBR flat strip only after function/location is confirmed
critical_measurements: Find and photograph actual pieces or installed path; take full-length tape photo, end closeups, holes/slots/notches, thickness, and witness marks
fit_and_test: Do not order until real pieces or vehicle station prove requirement
notes: Added to catch the longer full-body-width flat pieces suspected but not yet captured.

exact_recreation_spec: Toyota 48304-60010 long-stop family; free height 70 +/-1 mm; reproduce Toyota-style two-ear steel saddle/backing plate, tapered/radiused progressive rubber body, and flat rectangular strike face; mould base footprint BL x BW, bolt/stud pitch P, hole/thread D, and contact offset X/Y released from the cleaned left-front bracket and axle strike pad
material_spec: New NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to coated steel saddle; no tyre rubber or simple cut block
critical_measurements: Measure BL/BW/P/D/X-Y/G/F on the current vehicle; old bump-stop rubber is too decayed to copy; public sources do not expose the Toyota mould drawing
fit_and_test: First article seats flat, bolts pass by hand, contacts strike pad within +/-5 mm, engages before shock/tyre/spring/brake-hose or metal hard limit, recovers after 50 percent compression, and keeps saddle/bond intact
notes: Exact external height known; vehicle measurement releases the mould.

exact_recreation_spec: Toyota 48304-60020 short right-front family; free height 60 +/-1 mm; reproduce Toyota-style two-ear steel saddle/backing plate, tapered/radiused progressive rubber body, and flat rectangular strike face; mould base footprint BL x BW, bolt/stud pitch P, hole/thread D, and contact offset X/Y released from the cleaned right-front bracket and axle strike pad
material_spec: New NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to coated steel saddle; no tyre rubber or simple cut block
critical_measurements: Measure BL/BW/P/D/X-Y/G/F on the current vehicle; do not use a 70 mm long-stop height here unless full-bump test releases trimming
fit_and_test: First article seats flat, bolts pass by hand, contacts strike pad within +/-5 mm, engages before shock/tyre/spring/brake-hose or metal hard limit, recovers after 50 percent compression, and keeps saddle/bond intact
notes: Reject aftermarket right-front stops made at 70 mm unless deliberately trimmed and released by vehicle test.

exact_recreation_spec: Toyota 48304-60010 long-stop family; free height 70 +/-1 mm each; rear pair height match <=1 mm; reproduce Toyota-style two-ear steel saddle/backing plate, tapered/radiused progressive rubber body, and flat rectangular strike face; mould base footprints, bolt/stud patterns, and contact offsets released from cleaned rear brackets and axle strike pads
material_spec: New NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to coated steel saddles; matched rear pair; no tyre rubber or simple cut blocks
critical_measurements: Measure BL/BW/P/D/X-Y/G/F at both rear stations after Ironman ride-height plan; old bump-stop rubber is too decayed to copy
fit_and_test: Both rear first articles seat flat, bolts pass by hand, contact strike pads within +/-5 mm, engage before hard limits, recover after 50 percent compression, and keep saddles/bonds intact; hardness spread <=5 Shore A
notes: Make as matched rear pair after final ride height and axle travel checks.

vehicle_location: Main tub body-mount stations and cowl/rear shim points
requirement_name: Body mount shim and spacer pack
exact_recreation_spec: Flat steel shim/spacer pack by station; thin pack 1/2/3/5 mm x12 each; thick control pack 5/10/15 mm x4 each; Toyota references include 52212-90310 T=10 mm, 52216-90310 T=5.0 mm, 52217-90310 T=15 mm, 52033-90301 T=22.8 mm, 52033-90304 T=27.8 mm
material_spec: Flat steel shims/spacers only; corrosion protected; no random washer stacks inside the rubber sandwich
critical_measurements: Preserve and measure original shim packs by FL/FR/ML/MR/RL/RR; reconcile Toyota NO.1-NO.5/cowl/rear rows to vehicle stations before final selection
fit_and_test: Shim only at original metal-to-metal interfaces; tub doors/gaps and front clip alignment must settle without forced bolts
notes: Hardware-pile photo excluded from primary scouting images; BMA-008 station measurement controls final shim use.

vehicle_location: Main tub body-mount fasteners and captive-thread interfaces
requirement_name: Body mount bolts / weld-nut repair contingency
exact_recreation_spec: Working hardware basis M10 x 1.25 class 8.8 minimum; trial-fit pack 70/80/90/100 mm x4 each; M10 all-metal nuts x12; M10 nyloc nuts x12; M10 flat washers x40; M10 spring washers x20; M10 x 1.25 weld nuts x4; 3 mm repair tabs x4
material_spec: Marked structural steel fasteners, class 8.8 minimum; anti-seize at final assembly; repair tabs in 3 mm steel
critical_measurements: Confirm thread pitch, installed bolt length by station, washer/cup stack thickness, and captive nut condition after cleanup
fit_and_test: Bolts must thread by hand before torque; no spinning captive nuts; final torque only after tub alignment and shim stack are accepted
notes: Spec is ready for local trial pack order; BMA-007 controls final installed bolt length.
